title: 6 find Commands for Safer File Discovery
summary: Find the right files faster with practical find commands for names, modified times, large files, empty files, pruned folders, and per-file inspection.

test_environment.runtime: find available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Replace the example paths before running the commands.
Use local directories that contain files with known names, sizes, or ages.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/find_commands_for_safer_file_discovery.sh with real local folders.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example paths and run against directories with known files or metadata.
